runner_profile.primary_goal: Browser QA for stored rich workout identity fields
runner_profile.recent_result_summary: Fixture intentionally uses effort-only targets; no HR or pace truth is stored.

plan_preferences.notes: Disposable local QA fixture for saved-mode rich workout readback.

metric_mode.reason: Fixture stores effort-only guidance so QA can confirm no fake pace or HR targets appear.

planned_workouts.title: Steady aerobic run
planned_workouts.summary: Stored rich steady family and exact identity for calendar/detail readback.

segments.label: Warm up easy
segments.guidance: Start relaxed and let breathing settle before the steady block.

target.hint: If legs feel heavy, extend this warmup and shorten the main block.

segments.label: Controlled steady block
segments.guidance: Hold a smooth steady rhythm that is clearly firmer than easy but never pressing.

target.cue: Breathing is controlled; you could speak in short phrases.
target.hint: Back off if this starts feeling like tempo.

segments.label: Cool down
segments.guidance: Ease down until breathing is calm again.

target.hint: Jog or walk the final minutes if needed.

metric_mode.reason: Hill fixture uses effort and form cues only; terrain makes pace misleading.

planned_workouts.title: Rolling hills session
planned_workouts.summary: Stored rich hills family and rolling-hills identity for glyph and detail QA.

segments.label: Warm up on flat or gentle terrain
segments.guidance: Keep the warmup easy before touching the hills.

target.hint: Skip the harder block if the warmup never feels smooth.

segments.label: Six controlled hill efforts
segments.guidance: Run the uphill with controlled power and jog or walk the recovery back down.

target.cue: Drive tall, stay repeatable, avoid sprinting.
target.hint: The last repeat should look like the first.

recovery_target.cue: Recover fully before the next climb.
recovery_target.hint: Walk the steepest downhill if footing is uncertain.

segments.label: Cool down easy
segments.guidance: Bring the effort back down before stopping.

metric_mode.reason: Trail fixture uses terrain-aware effort cues without exact elevation, pace, or HR targets.

planned_workouts.title: Technical trail easy run
planned_workouts.summary: Stored rich trail family and technical trail identity for saved-mode readback QA.

segments.label: Easy trail warmup
segments.guidance: Start on the easiest footing available and settle into the surface.

target.cue: Short steps and relaxed eyes scanning ahead.
target.hint: Keep effort easy even if the terrain changes.

segments.label: Terrain-aware easy running
segments.guidance: Use gentle trail exposure; slow down on technical footing and keep climbs controlled.

target.cue: Let pace float with terrain; protect smooth form.
target.hint: Walk brief steep or uncertain sections rather than forcing rhythm.

segments.label: Cool down off the trail
segments.guidance: Finish with calm breathing and careful footing.

target.cue: No chasing pace on the way home.
target.hint: Stop early if footing feels risky.

planned_workouts.title: Controlled tempo session
planned_workouts.summary: Intentional compact-only row: no stored rich fields or source identity, so old-plan fallback can be verified safely.

segments.label: Warm up
segments.guidance: Begin easy and smooth before the tempo work.

target.cue: Relax into the first ten minutes.
target.hint: The warmup should feel ordinary, not urgent.

segments.label: Controlled tempo
segments.guidance: Run a comfortably hard block that stays controlled from start to finish.

target.cue: Strong but repeatable; do not race the block.
target.hint: If breathing gets ragged, ease back immediately.

segments.label: Cool down
segments.guidance: Jog easy until the effort feels fully downshifted.

target.hint: Walking is fine if the tempo block accumulated more fatigue than expected.
